title: SIEM Log Monitoring Playbook
summary: Built reusable workflows to parse system/network logs, flag anomalies, and map findings to NIST CSF functions.
highlights: Parsed auth and network logs to identify brute-force patterns and unusual geos
Documented response steps with containment and recovery guidance
Packaged repeatable queries to speed triage

title: Secure Portfolio Frontend
summary: Static portfolio with hardened headers, GSAP motion with reduced-motion respect, and data-driven content.
highlights: Implemented CSP, frame protections, and referrer policy
Built themeable design system with CSS variables
Added ScrollTrigger micro-reveals gated by accessibility prefs

title: Packet Analysis Lab
summary: Analyzed PCAPs to surface DNS tunneling, SYN floods, and ICMP anomalies with clear incident writeups.
highlights: Created incident reports mapping to Identify/Protect/Detect/Respond/Recover
Captured packet evidence and visualized flows

title: Risk Assessment Toolkit
summary: Lightweight templates to score risks, propose controls, and track remediation for simulated orgs.
highlights: Mapped findings to NIST CSF outcomes
Produced exec-friendly summaries and backlog items

title: Full-Stack Task API (Secure Defaults)
summary: Proof-of-concept task API with input validation, structured logging, and role-based access controls.
highlights: Implemented JWT auth and role gates
Added validation filters to reduce injection risk
Instrumented request logs for anomaly detection
